name: tenants
description: Community profile + join flow + membership/role data layer (owner/instructor/member). Public reads use a safe projection: tenants.discordWebhookUrl never leaves the server (P0).
notes: 0.1.0 (2026-07-06, agent beta): v1 scope of STATUS.md #1. Schema lives in the app-level convex/schema.ts (pre-composed from docs/DATA-MODEL.md); this slice ships the function layer + UI only. Request form & /admin approval queue are row #6 (v1.1). setMemberRole ships as data layer for R13; its management UI is v1.1.
